item.title: Download FFmpeg 8.1
item.description: FFmpeg is an open and open-source software project, consisting of a large set of libraries and programs for handling videos, sounds as well as files and multimedia streams. It is a free software consisting of a giant suite of libraries and programs for video processing, audio, multimedia files and streams. Its core is the FFmpeg program itself, which is designed to handle videos and audio based on the command line and is widely used for switching formats, basic editing (cutting and...

item.title: Download SecretDNS 3.8.7
item.description: SecretDNS provides a quick means to deploy DNS over HTPS, meaning it allows DNS (short for Domain Name Server) resolution to be performed remotely using the HTTPS protocol to encrypts data between the client and the DNS resolver. Its purpose, obviously, is related to data security and user privacy, to prevent unauthorized interception and manipulation of DNS data. Default DNS settings in SecretDNS use CloudFlare to ensure security. You can change DNS configuration in the dedicated tab...

item.title: Download HTTP Toolkit 1.25.0
item.description: HTTP Toolkit is software that provides the ability to automatically block HTTP and HTTPS traffic from most client applications, including web browsers such as Chrome and Firefox, most CLI tools and auxiliary languages such as Node.js, Python, Ruby etc. You can browse through traffic by marking the content type, status, and source or search by URL, status, and title to find important notifications. You can check the URL, status, title, and content of each request or feedback, along with...

item.title: Download ExtraMAME 26.3

item.title: Download ParkControl Pro 5.5.3.4
item.description: ParkControl Pro is free software to display and adjust CPU core settings in real time. It also has a bunch of free power automation features. Core Parking automatically disables CPU cores to save power when idle. Disabled cores are re-enabled as CPU load once again increases. This technology is very similar to frequency scaling, in that it seeks to throttle the CPU when idle. These tweaks are completely safe for any properly configured PC. The only way they seem to be able to cause some...

item.title: Download RepairKit 1.4.0
item.description: RepairKit is an all-in-one Java-based Windows repair and maintenance toolkit. RepairKit aims to provide a package that provides users with a dedicated system repair tool as well as quick access to some operating system features and some other PC maintenance software that comes with it. it. If you want to keep your PC running smoothly and want to do it conveniently, RepairKit offers a simple and effective solution for that, with an automatic repair/cleanup module , as well as access to...
